sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Let me track the movement pattern:
- Before DOWN: N at [[36, 29], [36, 31], [39, 31], [39, 29]] - rows 36-39, cols 29-31 (4x3 rectangle)
- After DOWN: N at [[40, 28], [40, 31], [42, 31], [42, 28]] - rows 40-42, cols 28-31 (3x4 rectangle)
So DOWN moved the player from rows 36-39 to rows 40-42 (+4 rows), and cols shifted from 29-31 to 28-31 (-1 col on left, +0 on right). The shape also changed from 4x3 to 3x4.
White bar before: [[36, 28], [39, 28]] - vertical bar at col 28, rows 36-39
White bar after: [[43, 28], [43, 31]] - horizontal bar at row 43, cols 28-31
So the white bar moved below the player and became horizontal.
Movement summary so far:
- RIGHT: +4 cols
- LEFT: -3 cols (need to verify exact amount)
- UP: -3 rows (blocked by target)
- DOWN: +4 rows
Let me now try to understand the game better. The blue targets haven't been collected. Maybe I need to position the player so that SPACE does something useful. Let me try moving RIGHT to get back to center, then UP, then SPACE.
Actually, let me think about this differently. The white bar seems to be an indicator that shows where SPACE will act. When the white bar is horizontal and above the player, SPACE creates a rectangle. When it's vertical to the left, SPACE does nothing. When it's horizontal below the player... let me try SPACE now.
